name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
description: Allows two parties to disclose confidential information to each other while evaluating a potential business relationship, with mutual obligations to protect that information.

name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement Cover Page
description: Fillable cover page that incorporates the Mutual NDA Standard Terms and captures the deal-specific variables (purpose, term, governing law) needed to execute the MNDA.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Standard terms for selling and buying cloud-hosted software (SaaS), covering access and use, support, payment, confidentiality, warranties, liability, and indemnification.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Governs an early-access relationship where a design partner uses a not-yet-generally-available product in exchange for giving product feedback.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Defines uptime and support response-time commitments, how they are measured, and the service credits or termination rights available if a cloud service provider misses them; designed to be used alongside the Cloud Service Agreement.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Framework agreement for engaging a services provider under one or more Statements of Work, covering deliverables, IP assignment, payment, warranties, and liability.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: GDPR/UK-GDPR-oriented terms governing how a service provider processes personal data on behalf of a customer, including subprocessors, international transfers, security incidents, and audit rights.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Grants a customer an on-premise or self-hosted license to install and use software, covering license scope, updates, open source components, warranties, and liability.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Governs a business partnership between two companies, including cooperation obligations, trademark licensing for co-marketing, payment terms, and confidentiality.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Short-term trial or evaluation agreement that lets a prospective customer test a product before committing to a full commercial agreement, with limited scope and easy termination.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: HIPAA-required agreement between a covered entity and a business associate governing the permitted use, disclosure, and safeguarding of Protected Health Information (PHI).

name: AI Addendum
description: Supplemental terms for products that include AI or machine learning features, covering permitted use of AI services, model training restrictions, IP ownership of inputs/outputs, and AI-specific disclaimers.
